# Windows 2000 / 98 professional admin tools — MMC, Event Viewer, Registry, Perfmon

**Clawmachine-fit rating:** B

**Notes:** Not a direct aesthetic donor but the tree+panel density model is load-bearing for anything 'operator console'.

**Credits / sources:** Microsoft Learn / MSDN archive, flylib.com, Google Project Zero, Akadia.

**Use:** internal non-commercial fair-use design reference only. Do not redistribute.
